commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align @auth/core with the bumped auth package or remove @convex-dev/auth from this grouped batch.; Needs attention: The diff has a concrete auth-provider supply-chain concern: it upgrades @convex-dev/auth without aligning its @auth/core peer dependency.; Review finding: [P1] Keep @convex-dev/auth compatible with @auth/core — package.json:76 (sha=e932e2715f33dee8d7018c8ed313b1a2941bd6a0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR bumps seven production dependency versions across the root app, Bun lockfile, and CLI/admin package manifests, including Convex/Auth, plugin-inspector, lucide-react, semver, and tailwindcss.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection reproduces the blocker: the PR head declares @auth/core 0.37.4 while its updated @convex-dev/auth lockfile entry requires @auth/core ^0.41.1, and the repository's peer check is designed to fail that mismatch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align @auth/core with the bumped auth package or remove @convex-dev/auth from this grouped batch.
